## Summary

Describe the problem, user outcome, and implementation.

## Safety and data boundaries

- [ ] Uses synthetic data only.
- [ ] Does not add secrets, personal paths, databases, logs, or PHI.
- [ ] Agent output remains review-pending until an explicit human decision.
- [ ] Schema/API changes include compatibility and migration tests.

## Verification

List exact commands and results.

## TUI evidence

For visible changes, attach synthetic screenshots or snapshot names at relevant terminal sizes.

## Remaining risks

Document known limitations and follow-up issues.
